name: Create Your Own Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 cup cooked beef, veal, lamb or pork
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients.
3. Mix well until everything is evenly distributed.
4. Transfer the mixture to a greased baking dish.
5. Bake in the preheated oven for 25-30 minutes or until heated through and bubbly.
6. Turn off the heat and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
